1792390.name: Life After End
1792390.description:
"Life After End — a fierce struggle for survival in post-apocalyptic Siberia, where every moment can be your last. Familiar places are now a nostalgic reminder of times past, which will seem like a fairy tale.

Be prepared for unbearable conditions: build shelters, search for food, create weapons and medicine. But remember, you won't survive alone. Look for allies, but don't forget that in this world, even friends can become enemies in a moment of danger.

Game features:

Realism to the limit. Remember that your actions will have consequences. Weather and your physical condition can become crucial factors. Illness, frostbite, hunger, thirst, and fatigue will be obstacles to survival.

Multiple maps and modes. Go through an engaging storyline campaign or immerse yourself in survival on a map with other players. The storyline campaign will be available some time after release.

Animal taming. Get yourself a dog, cat, wolf, or bear. Each companion has pros and cons. Choose wisely, as it can cost you your life. And yes, you'll be able to ride a bear, yes, yes.

Huge arsenal of weapons. From spears and bows to advanced rifles that can be customized to suit your needs - search for or create what will help you survive.

Crafting and building system. Not only collect, but also create tools and buildings that will help you survive.

Interactive environment. Block passages by moving furniture and tables. Close windows with objects. Use the environment for defense and attack.

Every decision you make is a chance. A chance to survive, sit by the campfire with friends, warm up, play the balalaika, and drink something hot from a glass. Otherwise, I have no idea what the game is about.
1792390.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语*, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
